name: Himalayan Panorama Tour
overview: Explore the best of Darjeeling, Gangtok with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Welcome to Nepal
itinerary.description: Welcome to Nepal. Upon arrival at Tribhuvan International airport our representative will be waiting for you, and will take you to a pre- booked hotel. In the evening tour, Pasupatinatha and Boudhanatha Stupa. You can also join for sandhya arati. Back to hotel and Overnight in Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: After breakfast,  drive to Kathmandu Durbar square and Swayambhunath stupa for h
itinerary.description: After breakfast,  drive to Kathmandu Durbar square and Swayambhunath stupa for half day guided sightseeing tour, PM: visiting Boudhanath and Pashupatinath temple, Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Nagarkot for Himalayan panorama tour, visit historical Newari town B
itinerary.description: Transfer to Nagarkot for Himalayan panorama tour, visit historical Newari town Bhaktapur on the way, which is as typical as early days O/N Resort.

itinerary.title: After the magnificent trip to Nagarkot, drive back to Kathmandu, rest of the day
itinerary.description: After the magnificent trip to Nagarkot, drive back to Kathmandu, rest of the day free for shopping and personal activities, O/N Hotel.

itinerary.title: Everest Mountain flight (optional) in the morning and transfer to the airport fo
itinerary.description:
Everest Mountain flight (optional) in the morning and transfer to the airport for your final departure or join our other program.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
